response.justification: Aisha has extensive full-stack experience across multiple languages and domains, with strong contributions to AI-agent infrastructure, cloud-native systems, and open-source tooling — aligning well with the job’s technical scope. However, the resume lacks explicit mention of Nest.js, Vitest, React, or Kubernetes in professional contexts, and key required skills like authentication security and AI agent development are implied rather than clearly documented. The mismatch in contact details (name vs. URLs) also raises minor red flags.
strengths: Proven full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud platforms (AWS CDK, Docker)
Demonstrated AI-agent and agentic workflow contributions at re:cinq
Strong open-source and tooling background with testing frameworks and CI/CD infrastructure
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js, Vitest, or React in professional roles
Lack of clear evidence of authentication/security implementation experience
Resume name (Aisha Okonkwo) doesn't match GitHub/GitLab/website handles (szabobogdan/gedaiu)
